footer.description: Empowering Ethiopian students and teachers with quality education accessible anytime, anywhere.

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your account to continue learning
auth.registerSubtitle: Join EdHub and start your learning journey

index.heroSubtitle: Comprehensive online learning platform designed for Ethiopian students. Access quality education aligned with the national curriculum, taught by expert educators.
index.whyChooseSubtitle: Discover what makes EdHub the leading educational platform for Ethiopian students
index.feature1Desc: Ethiopian curriculum-aligned courses covering all subjects from Grade 1 to 12, including Mathematics, Science, English, Amharic, and Social Studies.
index.feature2Desc: Learn from qualified Ethiopian teachers and education experts who understand the local curriculum and learning needs.
index.feature3Desc: Connect with fellow Ethiopian students, participate in discussions, and collaborate on assignments in a supportive learning environment.
index.feature4Desc: Earn certificates upon course completion and track your academic progress with detailed analytics and performance reports.
index.featuredCoursesSubtitle: Popular courses aligned with Ethiopian curriculum
index.testimonialSubtitle: Real feedback from Ethiopian students using EdHub
index.testimonial1Content: EdHub helped me excel in my university entrance exams. The Mathematics and Science courses are excellent!
index.testimonial2Content: The English language courses improved my communication skills significantly. Highly recommended!
index.testimonial3Content: I love the interactive lessons and the way teachers explain complex topics in simple terms.
index.faqSubtitle: Answers to common questions about EdHub
index.faq1A: EdHub offers free access to many courses and resources. Some advanced features or courses may require a subscription.
index.faq2A: Our instructors are certified Ethiopian teachers and subject experts with years of classroom and online teaching experience.
index.faq3Q: Can I access EdHub on my phone?
index.faq3A: Yes! EdHub is fully responsive and works on smartphones, tablets, and computers.
index.faq4Q: How do I track my progress?
index.faq4A: You can track your learning progress and achievements from your dashboard after signing in.
index.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Learning Journey?
index.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of Ethiopian students who are already achieving their academic goals with EdHub

about.title: About EdHub
about.subtitle: Empowering Ethiopian students with world-class education that honors our heritage while preparing for the future
about.missionText: To provide accessible, high-quality education to all Ethiopian students, bridging the gap between traditional learning and modern educational technology. We strive to preserve Ethiopian educational values while embracing innovative teaching methods.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
about.value1Desc: We are committed to providing high-quality education that meets Ethiopian curriculum standards and prepares students for success.
about.value2Desc: Our platform welcomes all Ethiopian students regardless of background, ensuring equal access to quality education.
about.value3Desc: We celebrate student success and provide pathways for academic excellence through comprehensive learning resources.
about.value4Desc: Every decision we make prioritizes student learning experience and academic growth.
about.storyP1: EdHub was founded in 2010 with a simple yet powerful vision: to make quality education accessible to every Ethiopian student, regardless of their geographical location or economic background.
about.storyP2: What started as a small initiative to help rural students access educational materials has grown into Ethiopia's leading online learning platform, serving thousands of students across all regions and grade levels.
about.storyP3: Our journey has been guided by the belief that education is the cornerstone of individual and national development. We've witnessed countless success stories of students who have overcome challenges through education, and this continues to inspire our mission.
about.storyP4: Today, EdHub stands as a testament to the power of combining traditional Ethiopian educational wisdom with modern technology, creating learning experiences that are both culturally relevant and globally competitive.
about.teamSubtitle: Dedicated professionals committed to student success
about.ctaSubtitle: Become part of Ethiopia's largest educational community and start your journey toward academic excellence
